# omni_user (Resource)

Manages an Omni user and its associated identity (keyed by email).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "omni_user" "alice" {
  email = "alice@example.com"
  role  = "Operator"
}

output "alice_id" {
  value = omni_user.alice.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) The email of the user. This is the identity ID and is immutable; changing it replaces the user.
- `role` (String) The role of the user. One of: None, Reader, Operator, Admin, InfraProvider.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The generated user ID (UUID).
